/usr/bin/g++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/CarApp3D.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/CarApp3D.dir/CarApp3D_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarApp3D.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarApp3D.dir/movingrectangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarApp3D.dir/glmesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarApp3D.dir/glscene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarApp3D.dir/glwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarApp3D.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarApp3D.dir/CarApp3D_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o CarApp3D  /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGLWidgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLU.so /usr/lib/libassimp.so /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
